title: Amazon launches GLP-1 weight loss program, promising 'fast, convenient' access
summary_full: Through Amazon Pharmacy, patients will be able to access medications including Novo Nordisk's Wegovy as well as newer oral GLP-1 options.
summary_public: Through Amazon Pharmacy, patients will be able to access medications including Novo Nordisk's Wegovy as well as newer oral GLP-1 options.
